name: Mars 2055
short_description: A first-person solo survival adventure set on a desolate Martian base. Search for clues, repair critical systems, and solve complex environmental puzzles to find a way home before your life support—or your luck—runs out.
detailed_description:
Loneliness is the only feeling you may ever know?

You wake up alone on a planet that appears to be Mars. There are no instructions. There is no help. There is only the suit on your back and the silence of a dead world. Finding your way home is the goal, but staying alive is the challenge.

Join the Mission

Join over 10,000 survivors who have already braved the Red Planet.

Rated 4.3/5 on mobile!

Fully playable on Steam Deck and supports Xbox Controllers.

Survive, Repair, and Escape

Mars 2055 is a first-person solo adventure where environmental storytelling meets complex problem-solving. In this desolate sandbox, you aren't just a passenger—you are the technician, the detective, and the survivor.

Key Features

  • Environmental Mystery: Search for clues left behind by those who came before—be they human or artificial.

  • Repair & Restore: Fix broken equipment and restore damaged systems to regain control of the base.

  • Secure Access: Use your findings to bypass security and access locked sectors.

  • MacGyver Mechanics: Combine seemingly unrelated items into usable modules to overcome obstacles.

  • High-Stakes Sandbox: Move carefully; a single miscalculation could destroy the entire base.

"Where does the adventure come from? It comes from the stories you tell yourself, alone, inside your head."
